FILAHOOK Soft Anchor 2.9mm

FILAHOOK Soft Anchor System · Shoulder Arthroscopy

All-suture soft anchor 2.9mm. Ideal for rotator cuff and Bankart repairs where bone real estate is limited.

MaterialUltra-High Molecular Weight Polyethylene (UHMWPE)
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

All-suture soft anchor 2.9mm. Ideal for rotator cuff and Bankart repairs where bone real estate is limited.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the FILAHOOK Soft Anchor 2.9mm, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The FILAHOOK Soft Anchor 2.9mm is constructed using Ultra-High Molecular Weight Polyethylene (UHMWPE), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
